cta.title: Ready to Ride in

about.heroSubtitle: Canada's premier luxury limousine service, dedicated to providing exceptional transportation experiences.
storyParagraphs: Founded with a vision to redefine luxury transportation in Canada, High5 Limo has been serving discerning clients for over a decade. What started as a small operation with a single vehicle has grown into one of Canada's most trusted premium limousine services.

We pride ourselves on our commitment to punctuality, professionalism, and providing an unparalleled luxury experience. Every member of our team is dedicated to ensuring your journey is not just a ride, but a memorable experience.

Our fleet of meticulously maintained GMC and Cadillac vehicles represents the pinnacle of automotive luxury. Each vehicle is equipped with premium amenities to ensure your comfort, whether you're heading to the airport, a wedding, or a corporate event.

focusAreas.title: Professional Experience
focusAreas.description: Over 10 years serving Canada with expert chauffeurs trained in safety, discretion, and luxury hospitality.

focusAreas.title: Commitment To Safety

focusAreas.title: Commitment To Luxury Service

focusAreas.title: Customer Satisfaction Focus
focusAreas.description: Your comfort and satisfaction drive everything we do — from booking to drop-off, we exceed expectations.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Fleet

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our luxury limousine services.

items.question: How do I book a ride?
items.answer: Fill out our online booking form, call our 24/7 hotline, or send us a WhatsApp message. Provide pickup, destination, date, time, and passenger details. Our team will contact you with a personalized quote.

items.question: Can I pay online?
items.answer: Yes! When booking, you can choose Pay Online (card payment after your quote is confirmed) or Pay Driver (pay in person during your ride). Our admin will confirm payment details with your quote.

items.question: Do you operate 24/7?
items.answer: Yes! High5 Limo operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including holidays.

items.question: Can I schedule rides in advance?
items.answer: Absolutely. We encourage advance bookings for airport transfers, weddings, and corporate events.

items.question: Do you provide airport transportation?
items.answer: Yes! Airport transfers are one of our core services, with flight tracking, meet & greet, and luggage assistance.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve the Greater Toronto Area and major cities across Canada. Contact us for intercity and long-distance transfers.

items.question: Are your drivers licensed and insured?
items.answer: All our chauffeurs are fully licensed, insured, and background-checked.

items.question: What amenities are included?
items.answer: Wi-Fi, climate control, premium sound, leather seats, bottled water, and phone chargers. Luxury models may include heated seats and entertainment systems.

items.question: Do you track flights for airport pickups?
items.answer: Yes! We track your flight in real-time and adjust pickup time if needed at no extra charge.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: We use a manual quote system. Submit your booking request and our team will contact you with a personalized, transparent quote.

faq.ctaSubtitle: Our team is here to help! Contact us anytime, and we'll be happy to assist you.
